notes: v1.14.96 - Redesign Step 3: Workspace re-home. pg-work goes from an empty scaffold to a Deploy/Scan/Handoff subtab hub (mirrors the Ref page). Scan is re-homed for real: redesign_homeScan() re-parents the whole pg-scan surface (scan hero, BT-gun, collected scans) into #wk-scan at boot, flag-gated, handlers/ids intact. Deploy and Handoff are overlay flows with no page node, so their tabs are launcher panels firing the existing deploy_quick()/handoff_quick(). cmd_route('work', target) now deep-links the subtab via new showWorkTab(); added .work-sub CSS + STAB_GROUPS['work-sub']. All under body.rd - field app (?redesign=0) reaches Deploy/Scan/Handoff via the legacy nav unchanged.
